name: senny-cli
description: TypeScript agent harness inspired by Late CLI's orchestration model.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && (cd core-go && go build -o bin/senny-core ./cmd/senny-core && go build -o bin/senny-late ./cmd/late && go build -o bin/senny-mcp-run ./cmd/mcp-run)
scripts.check: npm run test && node dist/cli.js --help && (cd core-go && go test ./... && go build ./cmd/late ./cmd/mcp-run ./cmd/senny-core) && npm pack --dry-run
